summary: Completed comprehensive testing of card games flicker fix. Verified all 5 card games (Teen Patti, Poker, No-Hold, Champion Poker, Andar Bahar) for smooth card dealing during REVEAL phase. Backend APIs tested for phase progression consistency. Frontend tested with sequential screenshots during REVEAL to detect any flicker. All tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with player@fungame.app / Player@123 returns access_token
Backend: GET /api/live/teen-patti/state returns correct structure (round_number, phase, timings, options, outcome during REVEAL/RESULT)
Backend: GET /api/live/poker/state returns correct structure with 5-card hands
Backend: GET /api/live/no-hold/state returns outcome with cards[5], hand, multiplier during REVEAL/RESULT
Backend: GET /api/live/champion-poker/state returns outcome with initial[5], holds[5], cards[5], hand, multiplier
Backend: GET /api/live/andar-bahar/state returns outcome with joker, sequence[], winner during REVEAL/RESULT
Backend: Phase progression consistent over 20s - round_number advances correctly, phase_ends_in decreases within phase
Backend: Bet placement on teen-patti (50 chips on Player side) succeeds and deducts balance correctly
Backend: Bet clearing (POST /api/live/teen-patti/bets/clear) refunds 50 chips correctly
Frontend: Teen Patti - Cards deal progressively during REVEAL ('DEALING...'), no flicker detected across 5 screenshots over 10s, winner badge appears at end
Frontend: Poker - Cards deal progressively during REVEAL, no flicker detected across 3 screenshots over 6s
Frontend: No-Hold - 5 cards dealt and flipped sequentially, hand announced at end, no flicker detected
Frontend: Champion Poker - 5 cards dealt, HELD/DRAW labels appear, discarded cards flip and redraw, final hand announced, no flicker detected
Frontend: Andar Bahar - Joker flips first, cards dealt alternately to Andar/Bahar sides, dealt card count only increases, winner announced, no flicker detected
Frontend: Bet placement on teen-patti during BETTING phase works correctly - chip balance updates, 'This round' total shows stake
Frontend: No console errors on any of the 5 card game pages (only expected AudioContext warnings)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all 5 card games tested successfully, no flicker detected, bet placement works, no console errors)
